note: For the 'special country' tier (anywhere outside USA/AU/CA/UK) -- used on top of global-core.json when there's no dedicated country file. Country-specific local directories still need researching per target country; this list is the global/worldwide fallback only.
target_count_advertised_by_competitors: ~85 global (plus ~15 local, researched per-country as needed)
gap_note: 11 solid global-only entries beyond global-core -- better than the last pass but still well short of the ~85 competitors advertise. General search is now surfacing mostly repeat names, which is itself informative: closing this gap further likely needs region-specific research (Asia, Middle East, Latin America, Africa each have their own major local aggregators not yet covered here) rather than more general 'global directory' queries.
